mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (category_id, brand_code, name, unit, unit_cost, status) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{brandCode}, #{name}, #{unit}, #{unitCost}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, (SELECT file_path FROM attachments WHERE parent_id = p.product_id AND category = 'PRODUCT' ORDER BY attachment_id DESC LIMIT 1) as image_url FROM products p WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT p.*, (SELECT file_path FROM attachments WHERE parent_id = p.product_id AND category = 'PRODUCT' ORDER BY attachment_id DESC LIMIT 1) as image_url FROM products p
(p.brand_code = #{brandCode} OR p.brand_code = 'ADM' OR p.brand_code IS NULL)
1=1 (p.brand_code = 'ADM' OR p.brand_code IS NULL)
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products
(brand_code = #{brandCode} OR brand_code = 'ADM' OR brand_code IS NULL)
1=1 (brand_code = 'ADM' OR brand_code IS NULL)
